description_long: This is a pair of rectangular wooden desks, each paired with a matching wooden and metal chair. One desk features a black tray holding a meal set, including a bowl, cup, plate with bread, and an orange, suggesting a cafeteria or school lunch setting. The other desk has a closed book, a tissue box, and a small rectangular object, possibly an eraser or chalk box, indicating a study or classroom environment. The desks have sturdy metal frames with crossbars for stability and simple, functional design. The wood surfaces are smooth and light brown, contrasting with the metallic gray legs and supports. The overall setup is clean, organized, and typical of educational or institutional settings.
description: Two wooden desks with metal frames, each paired with a chair; one desk holds a meal tray, the other has study items. The setup is clean and typical of a classroom or cafeteria.
description_view_0: Side view showing both desks and chairs, with the meal tray and study items clearly visible on their respective desks.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the surfaces of both desks, with the meal tray and study items displayed prominently.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, showing the arrangement of chairs and the items on the desks from a different angle.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the backs of the chairs and the overall alignment of the desks.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the one with the chairs pulled up to the desks, with the desktop surface and items accessible from this side. The back is defined by the rear of the chairs.
attribute_usage_context: student study and dining activities in a classroom or school cafeteria
